config.title: Karta konta #ifdef _DEBUG [THIS_FILE] #endif
config.script:
'CCardBuilder #include "50131" 'GetMenu #include "50506" 'section_* #include "50222" 'enum2str #include "50100" 'std_openform_object_hli #include "50610" #include "50200"
'popraw dane #include "50609"
dim g_pCardBuilder : set g_pCardBuilder = nothing
function fopen set g_pCardBuilder = new CCardBuilder
'REV:KB:TODO: Arek: proszę sobie zobaczyć jak można przełączać (true/false - 8 kombinacji) g_pCardBuilder.prepare_framework page_.topelement,false,true,false
build_menu rebuild_contents
fopen = true end function
'called once to build menu sub build_menu 'dodajemy menu items with g_pCardBuilder.menu .add_item "Popraw dane", "varFunction=""popraw_dane""" .add_item "Pokaż zapisy ","varCmd=CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE varDestPage=PAGE_RAPORT_ZAPISY_NA_KONTACH appvar_raport_type=RAPTEMPLATE_ZAPISY_NA_KONCIE appvar_zapisy_report_analit='"+cstr(page_.root.eAnalit)+"' appvar_zapisy_report_konto='"+ CStr(page_.root.strSymbol) + "'" end with end sub
'called on every root object change (including fopen) dim idCtrl_Budzety_Section : idCtrl_Budzety_Section = 0 dim g_pPlugFactory : set g_pPlugFactory = nothing
sub rebuild_contents set g_pPlugFactory = doc_.getmodule(60168)
with g_pCardBuilder .reset_framework
dim info:info = doc_.afc.convert.formatter("%1, %2, %3") _ .add(enum2str(TYPEID_N5KONTO, ENUMFLDNR_N5KONTO_ANALIT , page_.root.eAnalit)) _ .add(enum2str(TYPEID_N5KONTO, ENUMFLDNR_N5KONTO_BILANS , page_.root.eBilans)) _ .add(enum2str(TYPEID_N5KONTO, ENUMFLDNR_N5KONTO_AKTYWNE , page_.root.eAktywne)) _ .done()
.toolpane.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_STATIC,-1).text = info
'title .title = page_.root.strSymbol + " (" + page_.root.strNazwa + ")"
g_pPlugFactory.plug_konto_podstawowe .new_section(.fixedpane, "Informacje podstawowe"), page_.root.idobj g_pPlugFactory.plug_konto_opis .new_section(.fixedpane, "Opis"), page_.root.idobj g_pPlugFactory.plug_konto_obroty .new_section(.fixedpane, "Obroty z podziałem na miesiące"), page_.root.idobj
dim pSection : set pSection = .new_section(.fixedpane, "Budżety") idCtrl_Budzety_Section = pSection.ident
g_pPlugFactory.plug_konto_budzety pSection, page_.root.idobj
end with end sub
function fclose set g_pCardBuilder = nothing end function
function frefresh rebuild_contents end function
function refresh_budzet_section page_.ctrl(idCtrl_Budzety_Section).removeall
dim pBudzetyModule : set pBudzetyModule = doc_.getmodule(60139)
if pBudzetyModule.aktualizuj_budzety_all(trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY)) then trans_.saveobjects() end if
g_pPlugFactory.plug_konto_budzety page_.ctrl(idCtrl_Budzety_Section), page_.root.idobj end function
